merlin_thesis: NAS100 showing corrective pullback from ATH within a macro bullish trend. Price at 30,207 after 2 consecutive bearish D1 candles (-1.7% from Jun 1 high of 30,714). H4 dealing range broken to downside (price 30,207 vs H4 DR low 30,391). D1 dealing range in extension territory (147%). Testing SSL at 30,171 — if swept with bullish reversal, trend resumes; if broken with displacement, targets 30,000. Bias: BEARISH short-term for pullback continuation, but macro trend remains BULLISH.
